name: The Midnight Masks
intro_text: It is the night of October 13th, 1926. After your harrowing experience, you have learned that a group of cultists — worshippers of a being known only as Umôrdhoth — intend to perform a ritual at the edge of Arkham.
You must find and stop them before midnight. Time is short, and the cultists are already moving through the city.
setup_instructions: Set aside the 5 Cultist enemies. Shuffle them and place one face-down under each of 5 random non-starting locations.
The goal is to discover the cultists' identities before the ritual is complete.

R1.label: Resolution 1 — You stopped the ritual in time
text: With only minutes to spare, you confront the cultists and disrupt their foul preparations. The ritual fails.
But Umôrdhoth's hunger cannot be denied forever. You have bought Arkham time — not safety.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators stopped the ritual. Each investigator earns 1 bonus XP per cultist identified.*

R2.label: Resolution 2 — Partial success
text: You identified some of the cultists but not all. The ritual proceeds in part — enough to weaken the barrier between worlds.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators partially stopped the ritual. Award 1 XP per cultist identified.*

defeat.label: Defeat — The ritual is complete
text: Doom falls upon Arkham. The cultists complete their midnight rite, and Umôrdhoth stirs in its ancient prison.
Record in the campaign log: *The ritual was completed. The investigators suffer 1 additional physical trauma each.*
